title: GTA 6 remake
description: A request for a GTA 6 remake.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: GTA 6 remake (DEM-2026-0011)

Executive Summary
This proposal requests a remake of GTA 6. Given the high risk level and minimal project details, a preliminary analysis and scope definition are required before any commitment.

Direct Business Value/Impact
A successful GTA 6 remake could generate substantial revenue and significantly strengthen our market leadership in gaming. It would capitalize on immense brand loyalty and attract a large global audience.

Potential Risk Mitigation
Mitigation requires a comprehensive feasibility study detailing technical scope, budget, timeline, and market demand. Phased development and robust project governance are essential to manage the inherent high risk.
capacity_reasoning: High-risk demand requires Senior Architect oversight.
Delivery team has 26% overall available capacity.
Constraint: Senior Architect has only 5 units available (requires 20).
Constraint: Frontend Developer has only 15 units available (requires 20).
Skill gap: Required skills Database, Networking are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-07.
